title: Ghost Shower Rocking Hips
overview: Drunken Ferdi goes home from a night club and hits a car. A month latern Ferdi often sees ghosts. At the time Ferdi is also in a relationship with Sasha through cyberspace. Ferdi’s family who are suspicious try to investigate the background of Sasha. They find a connection between the presence of Sasha and Ferdi’s accident.
